title: Graduate School
content:
Graduate School

Non-Thesis Master’s Process

Okan Homepage

Education

Academic Units

Graduate School

Graduate Student

Non-Thesis Master’s  Process

MENU

Dear Student,

Welcome to the

Non-Thesis Master’s Program

.

Throughout your studies, you may receive support from the

Program Chair

regarding all academic processes and procedures. You may contact the Program Chair by sending a message through the

OIS system

.

For the procedures required during your studies, you can access the relevant forms and information on the

Graduate School’s website

. In addition, we recommend that you carefully read the

Graduate Education and Training Regulations

.

Course Schedule

Course schedules are announced at the beginning of each semester in the

Announcements

section of the Graduate School’s website.

Course Registration Process

You are required to select your courses through the

OIS system

and submit them for

advisor approval

within the course registration dates specified in the

academic calendar

. Course selections that are not submitted for approval will be considered

invalid in accordance with the regulations

. Once your advisor approves your selection, the course registration process will be completed.

Your

OIS username and password

are included in the SMS sent to you.

Program Duration

The duration of the program is

three semesters

. Within this period, you are required to complete your courses and prepare your

graduation project

within the same timeframe.

Project Writing Guidelines

You can access the

Thesis–Project Writing Guidelines

on the main page of the Graduate School under the section titled

“Thesis – Project Writing Rules.”

Graduation Process

At the graduation stage, you are required to submit the following documents to the

Graduate School Secretariat

. You may contact the Secretariat at

enstitusekreterligi@okan.edu.tr

.

Required Documents:

Final Project Evaluation Form

1 Hardbound Copy of the Project

2 CDs containing the project in PDF format

Plagiarism Report (Turnitin, iThenticate, etc.)

Artificial Intelligence Usage Report (Pangram)

Note:

The combined similarity rate of the

Plagiarism Report

and the

must

not exceed 20%

.

After the required documents are submitted, the

graduation procedures

will begin.

Graduation Ceremony

A graduation ceremony is held at the end of each academic year on the date specified in the

academic calendar

. Students who wish to attend the ceremony are required to complete the

participation form

published on our website.

We wish you a successful and productive academic journey.

Welcome to

Istanbul Okan University

.

Sincerely,

Graduate School

Istanbul Okan University

en
